/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/shaderqt-preview.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/shaderqt-preview.dir/shaderqt-preview_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/shaderqt-preview.dir/src/preview/main.cpp.o" -o shaderqt-preview  -Wl,-rpath,/home/shaun/Projects/shaderqt/build: libshaderqt.so /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGLWidgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6QuickWidgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
